title: Moroccan Briouat Delights
description: Indulge in these crispy and savory Moroccan briouats filled with spiced meat, perfect for a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F.
In a large skillet, cook the ground meat over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the chopped onion, grated ginger, cumin, cayenne pepper, and salt to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Unroll the briouat pastry and cut it into squares.
Place a tablespoon of the meat mixture in the center of each square.
Brush the edges with the beaten egg and fold the pastry squares into triangles.
Press the edges to seal and brush the tops with the beaten egg.
Fry the briouats in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the briouats on paper towels and serve warm.
Serve with a side of Moroccan chili sauce or yogurt sauce for dipping.
